Property Care & Maintenance

Quiet, considered
care for the land
you call home.

Bellizzi is a private property care studio serving the homes and estates of greater Charlotte. We tend, restore, and refine the grounds you live with — season after season.

What We Do

A complete
standard of care.

From the lawn to the canopy, the borders to the beds — every element of the grounds, attended to with the same considered eye.

i.

Lawn & Garden

Routine maintenance built around the rhythm of your property — kept consistently, never visited carelessly.

  • Mowing & edging
  • Bed weeding & mulching
  • Seasonal pruning
  • Fertilization programs
ii.

Tree & Shrub Work

From shaping a single ornamental to clearing storm damage — done quietly, and done right.

  • Selective pruning & shaping
  • Tree removal & clearing
  • Hedge sculpting
  • Stump grinding
iii.

Cleanup & Hauling

Spring opens. Fall closes. Seasonal transitions handled completely so your property is ready for what comes next.

  • Leaf & debris removal
  • Storm cleanup
  • Brush hauling
  • Gutter clearing
iv.

Bed & Border Design

Establishing new garden beds, edging existing ones, and refining what's already there to feel intentional.

  • New bed installation
  • Stone & metal edging
  • Plantings & transplants
  • Mulch & pine straw
v.

Hardscape Care

Patios, walls, walkways, drives — kept clean, sealed, and looking the way they did the day they were laid.

  • Pressure washing
  • Paver re-sanding
  • Wall & step repair
  • Driveway maintenance
vi.

Year-Round Programs

A single point of contact for the entire property, every month. The most valued homes don't shop the work twice.

  • Custom care calendars
  • Priority scheduling
  • Single monthly invoice
  • Owner direct line
Recent Work

From overgrown,
to composed.

A garden bed restoration. We cleared, regraded, transplanted ornamentals, and shaped new edges — all in a single visit.

Before
After

A single afternoon. A different property.

The owner asked for a refresh of the front beds before guests arrived for the weekend. We arrived early, brought in fresh soil, transplanted the ornamentals from the back, and laid clean curving edges to define the space.

By late afternoon the property looked considered — like the beds had always been that way.

Time on site

One day, two crewmen, one fully transformed front yard.

The Founder

Built by a craftsman, run like
a craft.

Bellizzi started the way most good companies do — with one person, a truck, and a standard nobody asked for but everyone noticed.

Every visit is owner-touched. Every job site is left the way we'd want our own property left. And every client knows the person doing the work, by name and by phone.

"I take it personally — the work, the property, the relationship. That's the entire model."

Dom Bellizzi Founder & Operator
